Partner program

The missing piece that helps you win bigger deals.

WiFi hardware is commoditized. The way people connect to it is changing fast. Purple gives you the platform that turns every connection into recurring revenue.

WiFi solutions

A platform, not just a product.

By moving customers to identity-based networks, you stop selling connections and start delivering a platform that earns recurring revenue at every renewal.

Staff WiFi
Passwordless zero-trust access

WPA3-Enterprise with automatic device provisioning and revocation tied to your customer's identity provider, via the Purple app. No shared passwords, no manual IT overhead.

Works with Entra ID, Google & Okta
WPA3-Enterprise, 802.1X
Automated JML
Guest WiFi
Frictionless visitor access

Branded portal or seamless connection via the Purple app, with built-in analytics, marketing automation, and first-party data capture. The layer that turns WiFi into a revenue tool.

Branded captive portal or seamless connection
Visitor analytics & footfall
Marketing automation
Multi-tenant WiFi
Private at-home experience

Secure per-unit isolation for residents and guests across BTR, student accommodation, and multi-dwelling units. Every tenant gets their own private network bubble, provisioned and managed through the Purple app.

Per-unit network isolation
A network pass in the Purple app
Browserless device support
The Purple app

One app. Every kind of connection.

Staff, guests, and residents all connect through the same app. It's the authentication engine behind Staff WiFi, the friction remover behind Guest WiFi, and the resident's remote control behind Multi-tenant WiFi.

Staff
SSO sign-in, certificate-based profile, access on every device
Guests
Opt in once, reconnect automatically on every future visit
Residents
Provision a network pass, devices auto-connect and isolate
Sectors

Sell into the right conversation.

Every sector has a different buyer, a different pain point, and a different entry angle.

Hospitality
Hotels, restaurants, pubs. Guest WiFi + POS integrations.
Explore ›
Retail
Footfall analytics, return rates, first-party data.
Explore ›
Healthcare
GDPR compliance, staff WiFi, patient guest access.
Explore ›
Education
IdP sync, Shield for safeguarding, BYOD management.
Explore ›
Residential & MDU
BTR, student, aparthotels. Per-unit private networks.
Explore ›
Enterprise
Zero trust, JML automation, NAC replacement.
Explore ›
Transport & venues
Airports, arenas, stations. Scale + compliance.

Hardware-agnostic. No rip-and-replace. Purple deploys as a cloud overlay on whatever your customer already has. Check compatible hardware →
Marketing support

We help you go to market, not just to product.

Co-branded assets, campaign packs, MDF, and bespoke support. Request what you need, when you need it.

Partner voices

Don't just take our word for it.

We provide WiFi for over 80,000 venues worldwide, with some of the biggest brands choosing Purple.

"Our partnership with Purple gives businesses, particularly those in the retail, on-trade, F&B and leisure sectors, the opportunity to take their WiFi service to the next level. These features help bricks-and-mortar businesses connect with their customers in the online world and turn insight data into smarter marketing and profitable customer communications."
BT
BT Business
Technology partner
FAQ

Frequently asked questions.

Answers to what partners ask us most.

Yes! We offer partners the opportunity to sell Purple WiFi under their own branding, as well as owning the customer relationship directly.

The Purple platform is designed to be hardware agnostic and integrates as a cloud-based overlay with your client's existing WiFi infrastructure. This means that in most cases, no additional hardware is required to deploy the solution.

We like to make things as quick and easy as possible. The time it takes to implement a Purple WiFi solution varies from a few minutes for the initial setup steps to a few hours or longer for the physical installation, depending on existing infrastructure and required customisation.

With our Guest WiFi, Purple provides invaluable insights for enhancing the guest experience by analyzing behavior, footfall, and return rates within the venue. Custom fields can be used for collecting specific guest-volunteered information, and your clients can also choose to conduct surveys to gather real-time customer feedback. Importantly, you can rest assured that all collected data is handled with the utmost care and security.

Yes! We understand the importance of maximizing the potential of our platform for both you and your clients. That's why we offer comprehensive training for our WiFi resellers. Our partner portal features an extensive collection of guides and resources, ensuring you have all the tools necessary to succeed with Purple. In addition, our dedicated support team is always available to assist you with any queries you may have.

No, there are no sales targets required when partnering with Purple. During the onboarding and discovery process, we may discuss your projected annual recurring revenue (ARR) through Purple products in the first year. This is simply to ensure you're paired with the most suitable sales or partner representative who can best support your needs. However, there is no obligation to meet any specific sales targets.

Become a partner

Join the program.

No targets, no minimums. Tell us a bit about your business and a partner manager will be in touch within two working days.

Partner application

Application received

A partner manager will be in touch within two working days.

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.
